programme.desc: A young man (Denholm Elliott) schemes to speed up his inheritance of his rich uncle's (Torin Thatcher) estate.

programme.title: Art Traffickers: Treasures Stolen From The Tombs
programme.desc: Through a combination of interviews and studio reconstructions, recount the gripping stories behind those who have excavated and stolen masterpieces.

programme.title: The Michelangelo Code: Secrets of the Sistine Chapel
programme.desc: Art critic Waldemar Januszcak tries to prove that Michelangelo's work at the Sistine Chapel contains a veiled meaning.

programme.title: Queen: Greatest Video Hits 1
programme.desc: An incredible compilation of Queen's biggest hit music videos between 1973 and 1981. It contains 'Bohemian Rhapsody', 'You're My Best Friend', 'Killer Queen', 'Bicycle Race', and more!

programme.title: Queen: Greatest Video Hits 2
programme.desc: An astounding collection of Queen's biggest hit music videos of their iconic 1980s run. It contains 'Radio Ga Ga', 'I Want To Break Free', 'Under Pressure' and more!

programme.title: The Seventies
programme.sub-title: The State of the Union is Not Good
programme.desc: America goes from bad to worse as the country deals with one crisis after another throughout the Ford and Carter years.

programme.title: Rolling Stone: Stories From the Edge
programme.desc: The fascinating series examining Rolling Stone magazine's all-pervasive influence on popular culture over the last 50 years concludes.

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: Auction Special
programme.desc: As the frontman of the iconic rock band Queen, Freddie Mercury was a complete one-off, and the story of his life gets told through the sale of personal items at Sotheby's in London.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: The notorious Kowloon Walled City serves as a fortified, lawless safe haven for gangs and refugees alike. But when a skilled underground fighter runs afoul of the most feared Triad boss in Hong Kong.

programme.title: First Knight
programme.desc: Dissatisfied with King Arthur's rule of peace and freedom, Malagant, an erstwhile ally, turns against the Round Table and establishes a hostile domain. However, he goes too far when he kidnaps the queen and imprisons her in an appalling dungeon. The special skills of the glittering and impetuous swordsman Lancelot must be called upon to effect her rescue.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers encounter the mighty Kong and other monstrous creatures after travelling to an uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Martial arts romp about a TV chef who becomes embroiled in a drug lord's search for an incriminating video. The kung-fu fighting cook steps in to save an investigative journalist on the run from a gang of murderous drug dealers, resulting in a potentially fatal mix-up involving her incriminating tape of the gangsters and a children's video.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The evil mummy Imhotep returns to wreak havoc as he resumes his relentless search for power and immortality. To make matters worse, another ancient evil has been unleashed, even more dangerous than Imhotep. Only the heroic Rick O'Connell and his intrepid Egyptologist wife stand in the way of these twin terrors as they embark upon a desperate mission to save the world.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Tech billionaire Lex Luthor seizes the opportunity to get the Man of Steel out of the way for good. Will intrepid reporter Lois Lane and Superman's four-legged companion, Krypto, be able to help him before it's too late?

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: After he and his wife are murdered, marine Ray Garrison is resurrected by a team of scientists. Enhanced with nanotechnology, he becomes a superhuman, biotech killing machine - Bloodshot. As Ray first trains with fellow super-soldiers, he cannot recall anything from his former life. But when his memories flood back and he remembers the man that killed both him and his wife, he breaks out of the facility to get revenge, only to discover that there's more to the conspiracy than he thought.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: The notorious Kowloon Walled City serves as a fortified, lawless safe haven for gangs and refugees alike. But when a skilled underground fighter runs afoul of the most feared Triad boss in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Twilight of the Warriors: Walled In
programme.desc: The notorious Kowloon Walled City serves as a fortified, lawless safe haven for gangs and refugees alike. But when a skilled underground fighter runs afoul of the most feared Triad boss in Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Blue Moon
programme.desc: In 1943 lyricist Lorenz Hart confronts his shattered self-confidence in a bar as his former collaborator, Richard Rodgers, celebrates the opening night of his groundbreaking hit musical "Oklahoma!"

programme.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when former bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Megan and Noah uncover a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating spiral of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders' side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her son's science teacher.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his bumbling father, Detective Frank Drebin Jr. must solve a murder case to prevent Police Squad from shutting down.

programme.title: The Ballad of Wallis Island
programme.desc: Old tensions resurface when former bandmates who were former lovers reunite for a private show at the island home of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he won't let her go that easily.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: The wife of a dentist convinces him to betray their new neighbour - a hit man turned informant - to the Chicago gangsters who want him dead. In need of money in order to hurry through a divorce, the young man arranges a meeting with the Mob in which he will exchange information for cash, but when his scheming wife tells the hit man what he is up to, it is the dentist's life that is placed in grave danger.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
programme.desc: Andie Anderson writes an advice column for a fashionable magazine and agrees to demonstrate how easy it is to attract then alienate a man in just ten days. She chooses Benjamin Barry, little knowing he's an advertising executive whose job rests on proving he understands women so well that he can make one fall for him in two weeks.

programme.title: The Hangover Part II
programme.desc: A group of friends go to Thailand for a quiet and restrained stag party, but are dismayed to wake up in a mysterious hotel room, with a man missing and no memory of the night before. Of course, Alan manages to get himself in with the crowd.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Girl You Know It's True
programme.desc: Grammy Award-winning music act Milli Vanilli become the first act to have their prize stripped from them after they are exposed as a fake enterprise with the singers lip-syncing to pre-recorded tracks.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: A soldier returns from Vietnam to find his boyhood friend, also a fellow soldier, in a military hospital, having suffered a mental breakdown in which he has become detached from reality and imagines that he is a bird.

programme.title: The Estate
programme.desc: Two sisters try to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in hopes of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family has the same idea.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness
programme.desc: A Black artist finds his path to success derailed by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Together, they learn that forgetting might be harder than forgiving.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who makes the mistake of saying what he believes, finds himself sacked and abandoned by all his clients apart from small time footballer Rod Tidwell. Maguire's personal life starts to fall apart as he's torn between love and money in Cameron Crowe's metaphor on Americans' need for success and money.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singleton's portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: In 1900s Vienna, mesmeric entertainer Eisenheim's magical abilities are wowing the crowds, with an act that ranges from mere tricks to an apparent capacity to raise the dead. However, he has also long been in love with Duchess Sophie von Teschen, which puts him in dangerous competition with the violent, scheming Crown Prince Leopold, who jumps at the opportunity to have the magician arrested grounds of necromancy.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Deep Sea
programme.desc: Swept into the sea during a family cruise, a young girl named Shenxiu stumbles upon a mysterious restaurant under the waves. There, she meets the scheming head chef and his ragtag crew of adorable otters and sarcastic walruses.

programme.title: Paws of Fury: The Legend of Hank
programme.desc: A down-on-his-luck hound finds himself in a town full of cats who need a hero to defend them from a ruthless villain's evil plot. With help from a reluctant trainer, the underdog must assume the role of fearsome samurai and save the day.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: The BFG
programme.desc: A 10-year-old girl, Queen Victoria and the Big Friendly Giant must devise a plan to get rid of Bloodbottler, Fleshlumpeater and all the other bad giants once and for all.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish disappeared as a young boy. Nobody believes his friend's story that he was sucked into the game they were playing. Twenty-six years later, two children find the game in their attic, and when they start to play, Alan is released, but the game isn't over yet, and Alan must finish before he is really free.

programme.title: Tim Burton's Corpse Bride
programme.desc: Anxious not to make a mistake in his wedding ceremony, Victor goes to the woods to practise his vows. Unfortunately, he slides the ring onto the twig-finger of a long-dead bride who has been waiting years for a suitor.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Penguins of Madagascar
programme.desc: The plucky penguins join a special inter-species task force in an attempt to stop an evil doctor from taking over the world.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: When Gabby's dollhouse, her most prized possession, ends up in the hands of an eccentric cat lady named Vera, she sets off on an adventure through the real world to get the Gabby Cats back together before it's too late.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: A wildly imaginative seven-year-old boy discovers that his new brother, Boss Baby, is actually a spy on a secret mission, and only he can help thwart a dastardly plot that involves an epic battle between puppies and babies.

programme.title: The Emoji Movie
programme.desc: Three emojis embark on an epic adventure through a smartphone to save their world from being deleted.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A glamorous career woman loses control when her married lover, a Manhattan attorney, ends their brief affair. Unable to accept his rejection, she pursues him at the office, and then at his home, eventually drawing his wife and daughter into the confrontation.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview

programme.title: The Warriors
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of assassinating top gang leader Cyrus at a rally, Coney Islanders The Warriors have to fight their way home over the course of one long, violent night.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: Jeff Taylor and his wife Amy are moving to California, and decide to ride across the country. After the car breaks down in the desert, Amy accepts a ride from passing trucker Red to get help. After hours she hasn't returned, and Jeff makes his own way to the nearby diner she was heading for. Nobody there has seen her - not even the trucker who picked her up.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Enter the Dragon
programme.desc: A kung fu expert is assigned to penetrate an island fortress to destroy an opium and white slavery empire.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent-turned-bodyguard finds danger and romance while protecting an entertainer from a stalker.

programme.title: The Firm
programme.desc: A young lawyer joins a small but prestigious law firm only to find out that most of their clients are on the wrong side of the law. The company is helping to launder mob money, get clients off charges and even murder partners who threaten to blow their cover, but when the FBI come calling to gather evidence on the lawyer's colleagues, he is caught between a rock and a hard place, juggling his life and his liberty.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: An international hit man and quick-change artist is hired by a secret organisation to assassinate Charles de Gaulle.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two wisecracking Miami cops are forced to swap identities in order to track down $100 million of heroin stolen from the police. Their only lead is a young woman who can identify the culprits, but when they track her down, she mistakes one of the cops for his partner, forcing the pair into a bizarre and chaotic life swap.

programme.title: Against All Odds
programme.desc: A fading professional football player falls in love with the girlfriend of a small-time criminal he's been hired to find.

programme.title: Falling Down
programme.desc: A middle-aged man reaches breaking point while gridlocked in Los Angeles traffic on a sweltering day. He abandons his car and embarks on a violent spree across town, increasing his arsenal of weapons after each confrontation. A detective who is working his last day with the LAPD before retiring begins receiving reports of the various incidents - and eventually realises that one man links them all.

On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: While visiting London with his family, Jack Ryan foils an IRA attempt to assassinate a government minister, killing one of the attackers in the process. Swearing vengeance, the IRA's Sean Miller follows Ryan and his family to their seaside home in America where he and his followers plan to exact their revenge.

programme.title: The Fugitive

On the run, he has to evade the relentless pursuit by the US Marshall, Samuel Gerard, while also avoiding everyone he knows, and finding out who the real killer is, the one-armed man who broke into their house.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The curse of an ancient mummy protects buried treasure in the Egyptian desert. An American mercenary who knows of the secret location is rescued from a Cairo prison by an English historian and her brother, and together they set off on a hunt. Along the way, the trio encounter flesh-eating scarab beetles, killer sandstorms, and reincarnated demons.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: In an attempt to avenge the violent death of his parents, Bruce Wayne fights to rid the city of crime and in particular, his nemesis the Joker. However, his defences come down when an attractive journalist tries to track down the truth behind sightings of a huge bat-like figure in the sky.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: After Selina Kyle sees more than she should in her boss's office, she has an `accident', falling from the top floor of the building to the street below. Awoken by the licking of cats, she is surprised to find herself still very much alive. She vows to take revenge on her boss and becomes a female avenger, defending women under attack and providing assistance to Batman's efforts to keep the streets of Gotham safe.

programme.title: The Krays
programme.desc: The disturbing story of the making of the infamous 60s underworld figures Reggie and Ronnie Kray - from their upbringing by a domineering mother in the deprivation of London's East End. The gangland empire they build is characterised by violence and intimidation, and the film is unflinching in its depiction of their rise to power.

programme.title: We Bury the Dead
programme.desc: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise, they hunt. Ava searches for her missing husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wife's death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3
programme.desc: Murtaugh is only days away from retirement when he and Riggs, along with officer Lorna Cole, are assigned to track down a crooked ex-cop who is supplying huge consignments of guns to gangs.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 4
programme.desc: Detective Riggs and Murtaugh are called into action to foil a Chinese crime lord who is selling immigrants into slavery on American soil. The pair aren't as young as they used to be, and ending up on a Triad hit list doesn't make things easy for them either.

programme.title: Trap

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: Thriller adapted from Thomas Harris's first Hannibal Lecter novel about an FBI profiler called out of retirement to help catch a serial killer nicknamed the Tooth Fairy. The agent has the uncanny ability to project himself into the minds of his criminal prey, but the case forces him to confront his past and consult his former nemesis - the now-incarcerated Dr Hannibal Lecter.

programme.title: Juror #2

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Harlem drug dealer Frank Lucas rises to power in corrupt 1970s New York, equalling and surpassing the notorious Mafia families with the reach of his empire. On the other side of the law, honest cop Richie Roberts dedicates himself to taking down `the most dangerous man walking the streets'. Lucas acts with impunity, smuggling heroin into the US in the coffins of American soldiers killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Brentwood, Essex, and the Kelvedon Hatch Secret Nuclear Bunker, which was used during the cold war as the headquarters for the regional government. Will they find evidence of the reported poltergeist activity?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Norwich's seaside resort Cromer Pier, which was built in 1902, after the previous versions had been destroyed by storms over the years. It now houses the Pavillion Theatre and a restaurant, but does it house spirits as well?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette Fielding and the team of paranormal investigators visit an airfield in Kirkby where the wreckage of two crashed aircraft is housed and where several airmen lost their lives in a deadly bomb accident.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team visit Moresby Hall, an old manor house which is now a Bed and Breakfast, where numerous human skeletal remains have been found, including in the chimney and under the floorboards.

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team investigate the Edinburgh Vaults, an underground tunnel system in the South Bridge that used to house hundreds of people in the 1800s, and where serial killers Burke and Hare reportedly sought out victims.

programme.desc: The team hold a vigil at Leith Hall, a manor house in Scotland that is reportedly haunted by the ghost of Laird John Leith III who was killed on Christmas Day in 1763 during a drunken brawl in which he was shot in the head.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Secret France
programme.desc: Rick Stein's `journey without maps' takes him through France's eastern border regions of Alsace and Jura home to his favourite French dish, choucroute garni and favourite French cheese, comté. He then begins to head inland into Burgundy for a memorable glass of auxey duresses wine and oeuf en meurette with a difference. Following a memorable Sunday lunch near the Swiss border he is inspired to recreate a traditional blueberry tart.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson finds a novel way to drive the new Vauxhall Signum, and General Motors' revolutionary Hy-wire concept car is tested. `Star Trek' and `X-Men' star Patrick Stewart is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car, plus a look at the Volkswagen Phaeton.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Dave and Si explore Britain's world-class beef. Known as `le rosbif' to our continental neighbours, the Bikers celebrate this nickname with a beef and suet pudding and oxtail soup. They visit a farmer focusing on the future of British beef with his elite wagyu cattle, discover the history of the much maligned beef dish, tripe, as well as learning how to roast an ox whole.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital, Athens. To learn more about Greece and the Greeks, he meets an extraordinary cast of characters, from gun-toting priests to the last remaining sponge divers. Getting behind the postcard image of this beautiful country, he finds out how the Greeks are coming to terms with a seemingly endless crisis.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy test drives the new Porsche 911 C4s, and there's a closer look at the Triumph TR6, and Renault Clio V6. Anne Robinson is the Star In A Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: The team look at track cars, and put Vauxhall's VX220 Turbo through its paces. As the search for the greatest car of all time continues, Stuart Hall makes the case for the Rolls Royce Silver Cloud. The Star in a Reasonably Priced Car is the now sadly departed `Countdown' host and pun master extraordinaire Richard Whiteley.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers' Best of British
programme.desc: Dave and Si explore the delicious relationship between food and faith and celebrate the vast range of faith-based dishes available in Britain today. programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drag a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer.

programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Series following a group of trawler fishermen in Peterhead, Scotland. Prawn boat Amity is in the grip of a winter storm, 100 miles from shore, with its nets caught on the seabed. Skipper Jimmy Buchan and his crew battle to save the boat and themselves. Elsewhere, a rival prawn trawler is filling its nets. Skippered by the young and ambitious James West, Fruitful Bough is one of the most successful boats in Peterhead.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Jimmy Buchan, skipper of the prawn trawler Amity, has just hours to decide whether to run through a storm to Peterhead or try and ride it out. Fruitful Bough, another prawn boat, is also wondering what to do - face the mountainous seas and gale force winds or lose vital fishing time by taking shelter in the Shetland Islands? Away from the storm, the whitefish boat Ocean Venture isn't catching any valuable haddock.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Ocean Venture has headed north and is fishing at `The Edge', only 150 miles south of the Arctic Circle. Having failed to catch enough fish, skipper John Buchan is taking a huge risk in the deep and treacherous waters of the North Atlantic in a bid to find the perfect catch. With the previous night's storm over, Amity gets back to the business of trying to catch prawns.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Offshore fishing, the most dangerous job in Britain, has a problem when it comes to getting new recruits, but 17-year-old Ryan wants to take up the challenge. He sets out on his first trip on one of the most successful pair of trawlers in Britain as they head into the rough Norwegian waters looking for cod and haddock. If he doesn't impress skipper Kevin West, he'll be looking for a new job when they come back.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale for the sale.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave gets a nasty surprise when he opens the bonnet of a fast Ford from the 80's, and an Austin Heavy 12 nearly a century old sets off a bidding war at the auction.

programme.desc: There's some good news for Lin, as her section could finally be lifted, but it means Alma has to convince Grandma Joan to let her mum move in.

programme.desc: A hyperactive ridgeback has ankle problems, while a much-adored family dog has issues with hips, elbows and knees. Plus, a Havana kitten suffers a broken leg after a mystery accident.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. That's where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars.

programme.title: Annika
programme.desc: A brutal murder on Glasgow's canals hits close to home when the victim is identified as a former police officer.

programme.title: Stacey Dooley Sleeps Over
programme.desc: We meet single mum-of-eight Marie Buchan, a lightning rod in the fierce debate over the UK benefits system who has openly shared her state-funded lifestyle.

programme.title: Women Behind Bars with Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald ventures inside two jails that hold some of America's most notorious women criminals, Indiana Women's Prison and the state's Rockville Correctional Facility.

programme.desc: Following Trevor McDonald as he ventures inside two jails that hold some of America's most notorious women criminals - Indiana Women's Prison and the state's Rockville Correctional Facility.

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: A materialistic city wife who believes appearance is everything swaps lives with a charity-minded farmer wife.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek, with help from the Mathewson clan, drag a mini pickup out of the barn where it's been for 20 years, and a 350cc Douglas Mark V motorbike from 1950 goes under the hammer.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Rob Bell looks at how the greatest invasion in human history was being prepared in Southern England and the buildings that helped with D-Day and Operation Overlord.

programme.title: World War 2 from Above
programme.desc: Using drone radar, experts uncover a WWII German trench system revealing a daring allied paratrooper raid to capture it. Also, underwater drone pilots try to identify a lost US vessel.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Bletchley Park near Milton Keynes with Fiona Bruce and the team of specialists. Pieces under examination include an ornate vase rescued at the last minute from the dishwasher, a teddy bear with a secret story, and a surprise valuation. Plus, a stunning Art-Deco brooch brings the house down.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Burghley House near Stamford in Lincolnshire. Objects exciting the experts include a valuable Lalique figure bought in a junk shop for under £1, an exquisitely carved model ship made by Napoleonic prisoners of war, and a rare medal awarded to an heroic pigeon. Plus, the valuation on a collection of cherished boxes prompts a brilliant reaction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: The Warship: Tour of Duty

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Interviews with Mountbatten himself, with Eisenhower's driver and with troops involved in the D-Day landings bring those gory and glorious days to life.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost of the bloodiest conflict in history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts head to the Scottish borders for another busy day of valuations at Abbotsford, near Melrose, once the home of Sir Walter Scott. Objects under scrutiny include a bottle used by smugglers to fool the customs men, a miniature battle scene exquisitely hand cut by a prisoner during World War One, and a dinner service fit for a queen.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team set sail for the Channel Islands, where the people of Guernsey give them a warm welcome at Saumarez Park. Objects intriguing the experts include a piece of furniture used as target practice by the Germans during the occupation of the island, a giant sapphire once owned by a Maharajah, and a single bank note which turns out to be worth a fortune.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek makes his way to Blackpool to pick up what will be the highest priced item at the next auction. But, the 1970 Aston Martin DBS needs a tow to the local garage.
